description: Create a formatted sales report in WPS Writer using Amazon Q4 2023 financial data. The document must feature a centered, bold title 'Amazon Q4 2023 Regional Net Sales Report' and a 5-row by 4-column table with headers (Region, Q4 2023 Net Sales, Year-over-Year Growth, % of Total) containing data for North America ($105.5B, +13%, 62%), International ($40.2B, +17%, 24%), AWS ($24.2B, +13%, 14%), and Total ($170.0B, +14%, 100%). Apply bold text and a blue background to the header row, right-align all numeric columns, and use alternating white and light gray colors for the data rows. Save the final document to ~/Documents/amazon_q4_report.docx.

metadata.title_text: Amazon Q4 2023 Regional Net Sales Report
metadata.data_source: Amazon Q4 2023 earnings report: https://ir.aboutamazon.com/news-release/news-release-details/2024/Amazon.com-Announces-Fourth-Quarter-Results/ and Statista regional data
